## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:

## Validation

- [ ] Tests/checks run locally (list commands below)
- [ ] Any required docs were updated

## Design-System Contract Checklist

Complete this section if your PR touches `design-system/**`, contract docs, or validation scripts.

- [ ] UX + CTO review requested before merge
- [ ] Token schema changes documented
- [ ] Component contract changes documented (props, variants, states, accessibility)
- [ ] Contract artifacts validated (`bun run validate:design-system`)
- [ ] Downstream impact reviewed (specialists/consumers noted in PR description)

## Emergency Patch Exception

Use this only for production-critical fixes that cannot wait for full design review.

- [ ] Labeled as emergency patch in PR title/description
- [ ] Risk and rollback plan documented in this PR
- [ ] Follow-up issue created for full UX + CTO contract review
- [ ] Follow-up issue link: <!-- e.g. /PAP/issues/PAP-123 -->
- [ ] Full review scheduled within 1 business day
